system.descriptor: Sleight of Hand is the art of manual dexterity and misdirection — picking pockets, palming objects, and performing feats of legerdemain.
system.uses:
Uses: Picking pockets, palming objects, planting items on others, concealing small items on one's person, performing magic tricks.
Sleight of Hand is typically opposed by the target's Awareness or Scrutiny. The size of the object, the number of observers, and the lighting conditions all affect the difficulty. Objects larger than a pistol generally cannot be concealed through Sleight of Hand alone.

description.value: Sleight of Hand is the art of manual dexterity and misdirection — picking pockets, palming objects, and performing feats of legerdemain.
